allow: Bash(node -e "const p = require\('pdfmake/js/printer'\); console.log\(typeof p, Object.keys\(p\).slice\(0,5\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const m = require\('pdfmake/js/Printer'\); const P = m.default || m; const inst = new P\({Roboto:{normal:Buffer.alloc\(0\),bold:Buffer.alloc\(0\),italics:Buffer.alloc\(0\),bolditalics:Buffer.alloc\(0\)}}\); console.log\(typeof inst.createPdfKitDocument\)")
Bash(node -e "const vfs = require\('pdfmake/build/vfs_fonts'\); const v = vfs.pdfMake?.vfs ?? vfs; console.log\(typeof v['Roboto-Regular.ttf'], Object.keys\(v\).slice\(0,4\)\)")
